name: Weathered/Natural Finish Small LP Round Outdoor Fire Column Natural - Threshold™: Heat-Resistant, No Assembly, Lava Rock Included
description:
Create a cozy place to snuggle up or host casual get-togethers in your outdoor space with this Weathered Small LP Round Fire Column from Threshold™. The heat- and weather-resistant design of this propane fire pit helps keep it looking great throughout the seasons. The round fire column is complemented by lava rock filler and a control knob that helps to adjust to the right temperature, creating the perfect outdoor ambiance. Plus, the side cut-out handles allow for easy portability from place to place.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
